name: accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in expense reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We simplify the reimbursement process instead of manual expense tracking and reimbursement processes.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in expense reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We simplify the reimbursement process instead of manual expense tracking and reimbursement processes.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual expense tracking and reimbursement processes

one_liner: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in expense reimbursements cause cash flow gaps. We simplify the reimbursement process instead of manual expense tracking and reimbursement processes.
